Simple Tomato Soup

A five-ingredient weeknight soup.

4 servings American

Ingredients

  • 2 cans (14.5 oz) crushed tomatoes
  • 1 onion, diced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream
  1. Saute onion and garlic until soft.
  2. Add tomatoes and broth, simmer 15 minutes.
  3. Blend smooth, stir in cream.
